sectionsModified: Permission requirements for page operations (added Synchronize to permission enumeration)
Page permissions for creating pages (added clone permission requirements)
docFactsUsed: permissionSummary.clonePage: READ on the source page AND READ + CREATE on the target parent page (WebPagesApplication.cs:677-691)
permissionSummary.synchronize: READ + SYNCHRONIZE on the page AND all ancestor pages up the tree (WebPageCommandManagerBase.cs:202-304, 489-519)
WebPageAclPermissionConstants: Six permissions — Display, Read, Create, Update, Delete, Synchronize
attemptNotes: Attempt 3: Gap-hunting re-entry — targeted fixes only for three gaps identified by the gap hunter. No previously reviewed content was changed. (1) GAP-001: Added clone permission requirements paragraph to 'Page permissions for creating pages' section — cloning requires Read on source page, Read + Create on target parent (from permissionSummary.clonePage). (2) GAP-003 Fix 1: Added *Synchronize* to the permission enumeration bullet in 'Permission requirements for page operations' — list now reads 'Read, Update, Create, Delete, or Synchronize'. (3) GAP-003 Fix 2: Added new 'Page permissions for synchronizing pages' section at end of file — documents that synchronizing requires Read + Synchronize on the page AND all ancestor pages up the tree (from permissionSummary.synchronize).
